_meta.citation: Phase 5 D-10 applied_cap=='floor' citation coverage: floor_rate=0.040000 with fall-then-rise drop_bps=400 (drops index from 5% to 1%, well below 4% floor). Engine emits 12 ResetEvent rows with applied_cap=='floor' out of 25 total resets (the fall window ResetEvents float at the floor).

notes: When the synthesized fall-window index hits 0.01 (5% - 400bps = 1%) which is below the 4% floor, build_arm_schedule emits ResetEvent.applied_cap=='floor' for each fall-window trigger. The first 12 of the 25 reset triggers (half-1 split per _synthesize_index_path 'half = len(triggers) // 2') fall in the drop window; all 12 produce floor-binding events. The remaining 13 triggers produce rise-window events at index=7% (5%+200bps) which is above the floor. Schedule introspection confirms floor binding.
